navbar.style: fixed top-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-50 w-[95%] max-w-7xl rounded-full border border-white/20 bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl shadow-glass px-6 py-3 transition-all duration-300
navbar.item: text-sm font-semibold text-slate-600 hover:text-[#1A6FEF] transition-colors px-4 py-2 rounded-full hover:bg-white/50

hero.layout: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center min-h-[85vh] pt-32 pb-20 relative overflow-hidden
decorations: absolute top-0 right-0 w-[800px] h-[800px] bg-gradient-to-br from-[#A8EDEA]/30 to-[#59D4C8]/30 rounded-full blur-3xl opacity-50 animate-float
absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-[600px] h-[600px] bg-gradient-to-tr from-[#1A6FEF]/20 to-[#0A2E6E]/20 rounded-full blur-3xl opacity-50 animate-float-delayed

event_card.base: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-[2rem] bg-white shadow-xl transition-all duration-500 hover:shadow-2xl hover:-translate-y-2
event_card.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 via-black/20 to-transparent opacity-60 group-hover:opacity-40 transition-opacity
event_card.content: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 p-6 translate-y-2 group-hover:translate-y-0 transition-transform duration-300
event_card.badge: absolute top-4 left-4 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold text-[#0A2E6E] shadow-sm

booking_modal.overlay: fixed inset-0 bg-[#0A2E6E]/60 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4
booking_modal.container: bg-white rounded-[2rem] w-full max-w-2xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-hidden shadow-2xl animate-slide-up
booking_modal.header: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0A2E6E] to-[#1A6FEF] p-8 text-white relative overflow-hidden

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Update `tailwind.config.ts` to include the new color palette (extend > colors > brand) and keyframes (extend > keyframes).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Update `app/globals.css` to add `@layer utilities` for glassmorphism (.glass), text balance (.text-balance), and hide scrollbar utilities.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Refactor `components/Navbar.tsx` to use the 'Floating Pill' design (detached from top) with glassmorphism.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Refactor `app/page.tsx`: Replace the standard Hero with the Split Hero layout. Implement the Bento Grid for events (first event gets `col-span-2` logic). Replace Category grid with a horizontal scroll container or marquee.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Refactor `components/BookingModal.tsx` to match the new rounded/glass aesthetics. Ensure `z-index` is high enough.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Verify that `use client` is preserved in all components.
instructions_to_main_agent.critical_note: Do not delete any existing logic (fetching, booking, auth). Only update the JSX structure and CSS classes. Maintain all `data-testid` attributes if present, or add them if missing.
